## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? Link an issue if there is one (e.g. "Closes #1"). -->

## How I verified
<!-- If you changed behavior, how did you run it? (tests, a local Ollama run, a screenshot…) -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes (from `engine/`)
- [ ] Added/updated a test for the behavior I changed
- [ ] Resale terms unchanged, or a link to the provider's terms is included
- [ ] One focused change
